changes.before: She had spent two years near that court, near Arthas, near rooms where people yielded before he entered. Near, not within.
changes.after: She had spent two years near that court, near Arthas, near rooms where people yielded before he entered, always close to the edge of them.

changes.before: Jaina felt the argument she had built for Arthas change weight as she crossed the camp. Not weaker. Harder to place in a hand already holding all this.
changes.after: Jaina felt the argument she had built for Arthas change weight as she crossed the camp, harder to place in a hand already holding all this.

changes.before: Not alarm. Not immediate danger. Recognition waiting for a second look.
changes.after: Sylvanas recognized the phrase a beat late.

changes.before: Jaina sat straighter and let the blue of her coat speak first.
changes.after: Jaina sat straighter so the blue of her coat was the first thing they saw.

changes.before: "The road kept going."
changes.after: "We kept riding south longer than I expected."

changes.before: They rode out before the camp could swallow them into one more conversation that would do no good.
changes.after: They rode out before anyone in the camp pulled them into one more conversation that would do no good.

changes.before: Recognition waiting for a second look.
changes.after: Sylvanas recognized the phrase a beat late.

changes.before: That thread of unease that did not belong to one sudden fright but to a long decision gathering in the body.
changes.after: That thread of unease came from slow strain building through the body.

changes.before: Nothing in the skyline confessed what it was carrying.
changes.after: From here, the skyline looked ordinary.

changes.before: The worst part was how cleanly the road and the city answered each other.
changes.after: The worst part was how cleanly the road and the city matched.

changes.before: The evidence she'd gathered all day had led here.
changes.after: She had followed the evidence here all day.

changes.before: The city still breathed.
changes.after: The city was still working.

changes.before: Then he picked up the page on the marked depots and read each place name instead of skimming for the total.
changes.after: Then he picked up the page on the depots and read each place name instead of skimming for the total.

changes.before: It looked alive. That was the first shock. Alive in the ordinary way. Gates open. Traffic in and out. Wagons unloading, others leaving empty for more. The towers full and feeding the road.
changes.after: It looked alive: gates open, traffic moving, wagons unloading and leaving empty for more. The towers were full and feeding the road.

changes.before: She watched the road bend through a stand of bare ash.
changes.after: The road bent through a stand of bare ash.

changes.before: She could already tell the difference between what the ward held out and what it merely thinned.
changes.after: The ward held some of it out and only thinned the rest.

changes.before: He listened. That mattered.
changes.after: He listened.

changes.before: It was a refusal built on reasons solid enough to stand up under inspection.
Seeing it corrected the last argument she'd been having with herself.
changes.after: She stopped arguing with herself.

changes.before: Princes buried in visible war did not turn for threats they could not yet strike.
changes.after: Arthas would not turn for a threat he could not yet strike.

changes.before: A real army, rooted in the ground.
changes.after: the whole weight of an army dug in for a stay.

changes.before: Jaina could feel the shape of her read waiting there, cold and complete.
changes.after: Jaina knew Sylvanas had already judged Arthas's answer.

changes.before: Someone high in the work understood trade as well as necromancy.
changes.after: Whoever planned eleven depots and road watchers knew trade as well as necromancy.

changes.before: Jaina could feel the shape of her read waiting there, cold and complete.
changes.after: Jaina knew Sylvanas had already judged Arthas's answer.
